name: Billy Joel
summary: One of the best-selling music artists of all time, known for combining rock, pop, and classical sensibilities with deeply personal storytelling.

name: David Bowie
summary: A master of reinvention who shaped decades of music, fashion, and culture. Few artists have ever moved so fearlessly between worlds.

name: The Beatles
summary: The most influential band in the history of popular music. Everything that came after them exists in their shadow, knowingly or not.
